story.iWant: 미션 실패 시 원인을 분석하고 재계획을 요청
story.soThat: 시스템이 자율적으로 실패를 극복할 수 있다

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Verifier가 실패 원인 분석 (장애물 감지, 경로 차단, 목표 미도달 등)
Planner에게 실패 정보 전달 및 재계획 요청
테스트: 장애물로 인한 실패 → 재계획 → 우회 경로 생성 → 성공

doc.title: System Architecture
doc.snippet: Verifier Agent checks success/failure and triggers replanning if needed. CrewAI delegation pattern allows Verifier to request new plans from Planner.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: 실패 복구 및 재계획 메커니즘. Prerequisites: Story 1.6 (Verifier Agent), Story 2.1 (RAG). Verifier analyzes failure, triggers replanning up to 3 times, uses CrewAI delegation.

doc.title: Previous Story - Safety Constraints
doc.snippet: Story 2.3 partially complete (Task 0). Pioneer 3-DX config created (src/config/robot_config.py), ActorAgent modified for accurate movement. SafetyValidator not yet implemented - Story 2.4 is independent.

artifact.reason: Primary file to modify. Already has verify_mission(), should_retry(), prepare_retry() methods. Need to add analyze_failure_reason(), should_replan(), delegate_to_planner().
Need to add replan_mission(failure_info) method. Already has plan_mission() for initial planning. Will use RAG for alternative strategies.
Actor executes action plans. Will be re-invoked with new plan after replanning. No modifications needed for Story 2.4.
Contains retry_count, max_retries=3, can_retry(), increment_retry() methods. Core retry logic already implemented in Story 1.6. Reuse these methods.
Need to add failure_reason: Optional[FailureReason] field to store failure analysis results.
Reuse is_path_clear_ahead() and get_obstacles_in_range() for failure analysis (obstacle collision detection).
Modify to add retry loop: Verifier fails → Planner replans → Actor re-executes. Loop up to 3 times (max_retries).

package.name: openai
package.purpose: LLM for failure analysis and replanning

constraints.constraint: Follow existing Verifier Agent patterns: verify_mission(), should_retry(), prepare_retry()
Use Pydantic for all new schemas (ReplanRequest, FailureReason enum)
CrewAI delegation pattern: Verifier calls Planner via delegation, not direct method call
Maintain 79/79 test passing rate - do not break existing tests
Log all replanning events with Loguru in JSON format
Reuse SensorManager methods from Story 2.2 (is_path_clear_ahead, get_obstacles_in_range)

interface.name: VerifierAgent.analyze_failure_reason
interface.signature: def analyze_failure_reason(self, mission: MissionCommand, final_state: RobotState) -> FailureReason
interface.description: Analyzes mission failure and returns reason enum (OBSTACLE_COLLISION, PATH_BLOCKED, GOAL_UNREACHED, SENSOR_FAILURE, TIMEOUT)

interface.name: VerifierAgent.should_replan
interface.signature: def should_replan(self, failure_reason: FailureReason, mission: MissionCommand) -> bool
interface.description: Determines if failure is recoverable via replanning. Returns True for OBSTACLE_COLLISION, PATH_BLOCKED. False for SENSOR_FAILURE.

interface.name: VerifierAgent.delegate_to_planner
interface.description: Uses CrewAI delegation to request new action plan from Planner. Returns new action_plan or raises exception if delegation fails.

interface.name: PlannerAgent.replan_mission
interface.description: Generates alternative action plan based on failure reason and sensor data. Uses RAG to search for obstacle avoidance strategies.

interface.name: ReplanRequest
interface.signature: class ReplanRequest(BaseModel): failure_reason: FailureReason; sensor_data: SensorData; previous_plan: List[RobotAction]; retry_count: int
interface.description: Pydantic model containing all information needed for replanning. Passed from Verifier to Planner.

interface.name: FailureReason
interface.signature: class FailureReason(str, Enum): OBSTACLE_COLLISION = "obstacle_collision"; PATH_BLOCKED = "path_blocked"; GOAL_UNREACHED = "goal_unreached"; SENSOR_FAILURE = "sensor_failure"; TIMEOUT = "timeout"
interface.description: Enum for categorizing mission failures. Used in RobotState.failure_reason field.

tests.standards: Use pytest framework. Follow patterns from Story 2.2 (28/28 tests passing). Unit tests should mock Webots and CrewAI dependencies. Integration tests should verify Verifier-Planner delegation. E2E tests can mock or use real Webots environment. Maintain 100% test pass rate.

ideas.idea: Test analyze_failure_reason() with mock obstacle collision (Lidar data shows obstacle at 0.3m)
Test analyze_failure_reason() with mock path blocked scenario
Test analyze_failure_reason() with goal unreached (GPS shows robot stopped far from target)
Test should_replan() returns True for OBSTACLE_COLLISION and PATH_BLOCKED
Test should_replan() returns False for SENSOR_FAILURE
Test max_retries boundary: can_retry() returns False after 3 attempts
Test Verifier delegates to Planner with ReplanRequest (mock CrewAI delegation)
Test Planner.replan_mission() generates new action_plan different from original
E2E test: Place obstacle → Mission fails → Verifier analyzes → Planner replans → Actor executes new plan → Success
E2E test: 3 consecutive failures → Final FAILED status (no 4th retry)
